title: Silver Round Metal Spike Candle Holder Pillar Candle Plate Stand 10cm
features: PILLAR CANDLE HOLDER | This candle stand features a simple yet classic design that complements any setting. Its shiny silver finish adds a touch of sophistication to your space

VERSATILE USE | Create a captivating atmosphere by arranging these candle stands in clusters with candles of varying sizes. Whether it's for a party, wedding, or dining table centrepiece, these candle stands set the perfect mood

CANDLE PLATE | In addition to its aesthetic appeal, this candle stand also serves a practical purpose. It safeguards your surfaces from wax drips and heat, allowing you to enjoy candlelight without worry
SECURE CANDLE PLACEMENT | The built-in spike ensures that your pillar candle remains upright and secure. No more worrying about candles tipping over
CANDLE HOLDER SIZE | Approximately 10cm in diameter, designed to accommodate pillar candles with a maximum diameter of 8cm
description: Enhance the ambience of your space with our traditional-style silver metal spiked candle stand. Crafted in shiny silver metal, this candle holder exudes timeless elegance, making it the perfect addition to your home decor
